steps.action: Inspect `openapi.json` for canonical and retired support paths
steps.expected: Only `/api/v1/portal/support/tickets/**` and `/api/v1/dealer-portal/support/tickets/**` are published; `/api/v1/support/**` is absent
steps.observed: Canonical portal/dealer support paths were present and `/api/v1/support/tickets` plus `/api/v1/support/tickets/{ticketId}` were absent

steps.action: Inspect `docs/endpoint-inventory.md` and `erp-domain/docs/endpoint_inventory.tsv`
steps.expected: Endpoint inventories publish only canonical portal/dealer support hosts
steps.observed: Both inventory files contained the four canonical support routes and no shared `/api/v1/support/**` entries

steps.action: GET `/api/v1/support/tickets` as validation.admin@example.com on company MOCK
steps.expected: Unmapped/not found
steps.observed: HTTP 404 with empty error body

steps.action: GET `/api/v1/support/tickets` as validation.dealer@example.com on company MOCK
steps.expected: Unmapped/not found
steps.observed: HTTP 404 with empty error body

steps.action: GET `/api/v1/support/tickets/1` as validation.admin@example.com on company MOCK
steps.expected: Unmapped/not found
steps.observed: HTTP 404 with empty error body

steps.action: POST `/api/v1/support/tickets` as validation.admin@example.com and validation.superadmin@example.com
steps.expected: Unmapped/not found for both previously strong callers
steps.observed: Admin create returned HTTP 404; super-admin create returned HTTP 404

steps.action: POST `/api/v1/portal/support/tickets` as validation.admin@example.com on company MOCK
steps.expected: Portal support create succeeds for admin
steps.observed: HTTP 200 with ticket id 1, requesterEmail validation.admin@example.com, subject support-hosts-1774583705-portal-admin

steps.action: POST `/api/v1/portal/support/tickets` as validation.accounting@example.com on company MOCK
steps.expected: Portal support create succeeds for ops/accounting
steps.observed: HTTP 200 with ticket id 2, requesterEmail validation.accounting@example.com, subject support-hosts-1774583705-portal-accounting

steps.action: GET `/api/v1/portal/support/tickets` as validation.admin@example.com
steps.expected: Admin sees tenant support records on the canonical portal host
steps.observed: HTTP 200 with subjects ['support-hosts-1774583705-dealer', 'support-hosts-1774583705-portal-accounting', 'support-hosts-1774583705-portal-admin']

steps.action: GET `/api/v1/portal/support/tickets` and detail as validation.accounting@example.com
steps.expected: Ops/accounting can list and read portal support on the portal host
steps.observed: List returned HTTP 200 with subjects ['support-hosts-1774583705-dealer', 'support-hosts-1774583705-portal-accounting', 'support-hosts-1774583705-portal-admin']; detail `/api/v1/portal/support/tickets/2` returned HTTP 200

steps.action: GET/POST `/api/v1/portal/support/tickets` as validation.dealer@example.com
steps.expected: Dealer is denied from the portal support host
steps.observed: List returned HTTP 403 and create returned HTTP 403 with error code AUTH_004

steps.action: GET portal detail as dealer and probe a rival-company ticket as portal admin
steps.expected: Dealer cannot use portal detail routes; portal host stays tenant-bound
steps.observed: Dealer GET `/api/v1/portal/support/tickets/3` returned HTTP 403; admin GET `/api/v1/portal/support/tickets/4` returned HTTP 404

steps.action: POST `/api/v1/dealer-portal/support/tickets` as validation.dealer@example.com on company MOCK
steps.expected: Dealer support create succeeds on the dealer portal host
steps.observed: HTTP 200 with ticket id 3, requesterEmail validation.dealer@example.com, subject support-hosts-1774583705-dealer

steps.action: GET `/api/v1/dealer-portal/support/tickets` as validation.dealer@example.com
steps.expected: Dealer list is self-scoped
steps.observed: HTTP 200 with subjects ['support-hosts-1774583705-dealer']; admin/accounting portal tickets were absent

steps.action: GET `/api/v1/dealer-portal/support/tickets/{ticketId}` as validation.dealer@example.com
steps.expected: Dealer can read only its own dealer ticket
steps.observed: Own detail `/api/v1/dealer-portal/support/tickets/3` returned HTTP 200

steps.action: POST and GET dealer support as validation.rival.dealer@example.com on company RIVAL
steps.expected: Rival dealer gets its own isolated ticket only
steps.observed: Create returned HTTP 200 with id 4; own detail returned HTTP 200

steps.action: Cross-company dealer probes between MOCK and RIVAL ticket ids
steps.expected: Peer/cross-company dealer access fails closed
steps.observed: Dealer GET `/api/v1/dealer-portal/support/tickets/4` returned HTTP 404; rival dealer GET `/api/v1/dealer-portal/support/tickets/3` returned HTTP 404

steps.action: Use an admin actor on the dealer host
steps.expected: Admin/ops records do not leak into dealer support workflows
steps.observed: Admin GET `/api/v1/dealer-portal/support/tickets` returned HTTP 403 and GET `/api/v1/dealer-portal/support/tickets/3` returned HTTP 403

network: GET /api/v1/dealer-portal/support/tickets/4 (dealer MOCK) -> 404 reason=Support ticket not found: 4
GET /api/v1/dealer-portal/support/tickets/3 (rival dealer RIVAL) -> 404 reason=Support ticket not found: 3

steps.action: Use a dealer token on `/api/v1/portal/support/tickets` list/create/detail
steps.expected: Cross-host access is denied on the portal host
steps.observed: List returned HTTP 403; create returned HTTP 403; detail returned HTTP 403 with message Access denied

steps.action: Use an admin token on `/api/v1/dealer-portal/support/tickets` list/create/detail
steps.expected: Cross-host access is denied on the dealer host
steps.observed: List returned HTTP 403; create returned HTTP 403; detail returned HTTP 403 with message Access denied

steps.action: Probe admin ticket id from the dealer host as a dealer
steps.expected: Cross-host ID probing fails closed
steps.observed: GET `/api/v1/dealer-portal/support/tickets/1` returned HTTP 404 with business reason Support ticket not found: 1

steps.action: Send mismatched `X-Company-Code` headers on portal and dealer hosts
steps.expected: Tenant mismatch fails closed
steps.observed: Admin portal list with header RIVAL returned HTTP 403 reason COMPANY_CONTEXT_MISMATCH; dealer list/detail with header RIVAL returned HTTP 403/403 reason COMPANY_CONTEXT_MISMATCH

steps.action: Use validation.superadmin@example.com against portal and dealer tenant support flows
steps.expected: Platform/super-admin access does not leak into tenant support workflows
steps.observed: Portal create returned HTTP 403, portal list returned HTTP 403, dealer list returned HTTP 403 with reason SUPER_ADMIN_PLATFORM_ONLY

steps.action: Probe rival-company ticket from portal admin host
steps.expected: Portal admin host remains tenant-bound and does not leak cross-company support records
steps.observed: GET `/api/v1/portal/support/tickets/4` as admin returned HTTP 404 with reason Support ticket not found: 4

network: GET /api/v1/dealer-portal/support/tickets/1 (dealer MOCK) -> 404 reason=Support ticket not found: 1

frictions.description: `http://localhost:9090/actuator/health` returned DOWN/503 even though authenticated API probes on `http://localhost:8081` were healthy; mission guidance says actuator degradation is non-blocking when target endpoints succeed.
frictions.resolution: Proceeded with authenticated support-host probes on port 8081 and recorded the actuator state as context only.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 4 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Canonical support hosts were present only on `/api/v1/portal/**` and `/api/v1/dealer-portal/**`, the shared `/api/v1/support/**` surface returned 404, portal support admitted admin/accounting only, dealer support stayed self-scoped, tenant mismatch probes failed with `COMPANY_CONTEXT_MISMATCH`, and super-admin tenant support probes failed with `SUPER_ADMIN_PLATFORM_ONLY`.
